lines.content: // Manually include all platform natives for the final JAR
// IMPORTANT: Point this to your Launcher class (see Step 2)
// Merge service files for proper library loading
This is a greenfield Java project where you can interact with Monika from the visual novel Doki Doki Literature Club. She will help you with tasks management.
## This application is very easy to use. Just
* Click the JAR file to start
1. randomly greets you with some surprises 😉

greetings are adapted from [Monika After Story dlc of the Visual Novel Doki Doki Literature Club](https://github.com/Monika-After-Story/MonikaModDev/blob/master/Monika%20After%20Story/game/script-greetings.rpy)
3. asks you to set a username the first time you run this application (choose any non empty name besides Monika)
- *day (simply enter 3 letter abbreviations * = mon, tue, ... or full word = monday, tuesday, ...), interpreted as the next *day on the calendar
- HHmm, HH:mm, MM-DD, YYYYMMDD, YYYYMMDD-HHmm, YYYY-MM-DD, DD-MM-YYYY, YYYYMMDD-HH-mm, YYYY-MM-DD-HHmm(or HH-mm), DD-MM-YYYY-HHmm(or HH-mm)
- (Month) dd, where (month) can be 3 letters abbreviation or full word, interpreted as the next corresponding day (restriction: within a year, so "feb 29" doesn't work in 2026)

Note: omitted time description in deadline and event is allowed. It will be displayed as "Unspecified". Strings that are not in the correct format above will be stored in original format instead of throwing an error (I believe this is a better approach, sometimes people may set a flexible deadline, the original string can then serve as a simple discription).
6. A Data folder will be generated in a parallel folder structure to the JAR
![A few screenshots together from left to right (chronological order)](Ui.png)
## Please remember to say bye to her when closing the application

Monika gets upset next time if you close the program by clicking the "×" on the application window or using alt+f4. She refuses to update your tasks info if you don't say bye to quit. (Note: This is a feature from the original game. I promise it is not me being lazy with my storage logic designs.)

// Parse and filter tokenized string words to purely integers representing time
boolean isValidDate(int year, int month, int day) {
* Accept formats: *day (enter 3 letter abbreviations * = mon, tue, ... or full word = monday, tuesday, ...)
* HHmm, HH:mm, MM-DD, YYYYMMDD, YYYYMMDD-HHmm, YYYY-MM-DD, DD-MM-YYYY, YYYYMMDD-HH-mm, YYYY-MM-DD-HHmm(or HH-mm), DD-MM-YYYY-HHmm(or HH-mm)
* For 2 tokens, [: and other separators] are treated differently
* This is a large constructor with time identifying logic
* Assumes date = today (or tomorrow if provided time is before now) if not specified
* Ignores hour and minute if only date specified
* Understood time will set isUnderstood to true, otherwise false
* @param s as a String which contains the correctly formatted String
time = LocalDateTime.of(now.getYear(), now.getMonthValue(), now.getDayOfMonth(), h, m);
int ty = times.get(0) / 10000, tm = times.get(0) % 10000, td = tm % 100;
time = LocalDateTime.of(now.getYear(), now.getMonthValue(), now.getDayOfMonth(), times.get(0), times.get(1));
int y = times.get(0) / 10000, M = times.get(0) % 10000, d = M % 100, h = times.get(1) / 100, m = times.get(1) % 100;
time = LocalDateTime.of(y, M, d, h, m);
int y = now.getYear(), m = times.get(0), d = times.get(1);
if (isValidDate(y, m, d) && LocalDateTime.of(y, m, d, 0, 0).isAfter(LocalDateTime.now())) {
int y = times.get(0) / 10000, M = times.get(0) % 10000, d = M % 100, h = times.get(1), m = times.get(2);
time = LocalDateTime.of(y, M, d, h, m);
time = LocalDateTime.of(times.get(0), times.get(1), times.get(2), h, m, 0);
} else if (isValidDate(times.get(2), times.get(1), times.get(0)) && isValidTime(h, m)) {
time = LocalDateTime.of(times.get(2), times.get(1), times.get(0), h, m, 0);
time = LocalDateTime.of(times.get(0), times.get(1), times.get(2), times.get(3), times.get(4), 0);
} else if (isValidDate(times.get(2), times.get(1), times.get(0)) && isValidTime(times.get(3), times.get(4))){
time = LocalDateTime.of(times.get(2), times.get(1), times.get(0), times.get(3), times.get(4), 0);

Yay, there you are! What can I do for you?
Hi again, [player]. What shall we do now?
Welcome back, [player]! I hope your day is going well. You're here after all. Nothing can go wrong now, ehehe~
It's so nice to see you again. What shall we do now, [player]?
I'm so happy to see you again. Let's spend some more time together, okay?
I was starting to miss you. Let's have another lovely day together, alright?
Hello again, [player]. What can I do for you today?
There you are [player], it's so nice of you to visit. You're always so thoughtful. Thanks for spending so much time with me~
It's so good to see you again! Don't make me wait so long next time, ehehe~
Thank you for coming back. I really do love spending time with you. What should we do today?
It's so good to see you again! Please remember to visit me, okay? I'll always be waiting here for you.
You're back! I'm so happy you came back to visit me so soon~
~Every day,~I imagine a future where I can be with you...~ Oh, you're here! I was just daydreaming and singing a bit.
Each day becomes better and better with you by my side! That said, I'm so happy that you're finally here.
I'm so glad you're here, [player]! What should we do today?
È così bello vederti ancora, amore mio... I'm still practicing my Italian. It's a very difficult language! Anyway, it's so nice to see you again.
Hey everybody, welcome back to another episode of... Just Monika! I was impersonating a youtuber. I hope I gave you a good laugh, ehehe~
You're my beautiful flower, ehehe~ Oh, that sounded so awkward. But I really will always take care of you.
A day without Monika is a day wasted. Ahaha! Welcome back, [player].
Maximum recursion depth exceeded... How is this even happening? Oh, hi [player]! I was trying to learn some coding.
